manual_recovery_snapshots.required_delete_gate: typed snapshot metadata plus recovery settlement plus replacement/rollback proof plus owner approval

snapshots.gate: typed metadata present; deletion still requires recovery settlement, rollback proof, and owner approval
snapshots.name: data.img.pre-e2fsck-20260703T182100Z
snapshots.purpose: Preserve pre-e2fsck owner realization as read-only extraction evidence; never a constructor input

snapshots.gate: typed metadata present; deletion still requires recovery settlement, rollback proof, and owner approval
snapshots.name: data.img.rollback-20260704T0426Z
snapshots.purpose: Preserve owner rollback realization as read-only evidence; never a constructor input

post_reclaim_storage_report.mode: report-only; no deletion, GC, service restart, or VM mutation
next_required_proof: Use scripts/node-b-storage-vm-gates to review fake-domain and synthetic-owner rows before any active cleanup.
Attach typed manual snapshot metadata or keep current filename-inferred snapshot refusals.
Keep missing-auth-user UUID VMs refused unless scripts/node-b-storage-vm-gates reports lineage/tombstone proof, owner approval, rollback/refusal record, and staged proof.

gc_plan.proposed_gc_gate: ad hoc GC only after stale roots/generations are reviewed and protected roots remain preserved
